---
title: unchecked-type-assertion
description: "Require checked type assertions."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Require checked type assertions. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
value := input.(string)
```

## Good

```go
value, ok := input.(string)
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only unchecked-type-assertion`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
